mapper.select: SELECT e.*, ep.paper_name, ep.duration, ep.total_score, ep.pass_score, s.subject_name FROM exam e LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON e.paper_id = ep.paper_id LEFT JOIN subject s ON ep.subject_id = s.subject_id WHERE e.class_id = #{classId} AND e.end_time > NOW() AND e.status >= 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM exam_record er WHERE er.exam_id = e.exam_id AND er.student_id = #{studentId} AND er.status = 1 ) ORDER BY e.start_time ASC

SELECT e.*, ep.paper_name, ep.duration, ep.total_score, ep.pass_score, s.subject_name FROM exam e LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON e.paper_id = ep.paper_id LEFT JOIN subject s ON ep.subject_id = s.subject_id WHERE e.exam_id = #{examId}

SELECT e.*, ep.paper_name, ep.duration, ep.total_score, ep.pass_score, s.subject_name FROM exam e LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON e.paper_id = ep.paper_id LEFT JOIN subject s ON ep.subject_id = s.subject_id WHERE e.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY e.start_time DESC
